name: Fiddlehead Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the fiddleheads, beaten eggs, flour, grated Parmesan, grated mozzarella, salt, and pepper. Stir well and set aside.
2. In a small saucepan, heat the oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and minced garlic, and cook for 1-2 minutes or until the onions are transparent. Remove from heat and combine with the fiddlehead mixture, stirring well.
3. Grease a 30 cm round pizza pan and pour the mixture into the pan. Scatter the dried oregano and basil over the tomato sauce. Spread the tomato sauce evenly over the crust and sprinkle with crumbled bacon and additional grated Parmesan and mozzarella cheese.
4. Arrange the remaining cooked fiddleheads on top of the pizza.
5. Bake at 180°C (356°F) for 20 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
